topics.title: Howard Stern and Sirius Satellite Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of Artie Lange's personal life, the legal challenges facing CBS executive Les Moonves, and the transition of Howard Stern's show to Sirius Satellite Radio.

topics.title: Radio Programming and Show Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener feedback regarding show content, the potential for replaying segments on different channels, and a review of a recent guest appearance.

topics.title: Academy Awards Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Academy Awards, critiquing various celebrities' appearances and performances while debating why certain figures like Jay Leno are excluded from hosting.

topics.title: Clef Pallet Health and Identity
topics.summary: The studio discusses the medical condition of Clef Pallet, clarifying that he has a speech impediment rather than a cleft palate, while also addressing his recent hospitalization for an aneurysm.

topics.title: Hospital Call and Show Updates
topics.summary: The show features a phone call with a listener who recently underwent medical treatment, followed by discussions regarding upcoming segments and news items.

topics.title: IRS Taxing of Celebrity Gift Baskets
topics.summary: The show discusses reports that the IRS may begin taxing high-value items in celebrity gift baskets, such as expensive medical certificates.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and Technical Challenges
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the legal ramifications of a lawsuit involving CVS, an analysis of historical racial stereotyping in radio history, and a debate over technical issues with guest microphone equipment.

topics.title: Former Officer's Criminal Career
topics.summary: The studio features a former police officer who details his transition from law enforcement to a life of corruption involving drug information, theft, and luxury living before his eventual conviction.

topics.title: Former Corrupt Officer Interview
topics.summary: The show features a former officer who spent 12 years in prison for corruption, discussing his illegal activities with the mob, his life after release, and the impact of his actions on the policing community.

topics.title: Dirty Cop Interview and Media Feuds
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a former officer discussing his criminal past, followed by segments on the death of Dana Reeve and a media feud between Bill O'Reilly and Keith Obermann.

topics.title: Rosanna Arquette Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts discuss the media landscape, personal anecdotes regarding celebrity relationships, and a candid interview with actress Rosanna Arquette.

topics.title: Rosanna Arquette Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Rosanna Arquette regarding her past roles, personal life, and experiences in the film industry.

topics.title: Production Meeting and Show Prep
topics.summary: The studio prepares for upcoming segments including a review of top show moments, discussions on guest appearances like Michael Dowd, and logistical coordination for an upcoming interview with Sean Hannity.

topics.title: Demographic Shifts in New York
topics.summary: The studio discusses a report indicating that the white population in the New York metropolitan area is projected to become a minority due to an influx of Hispanic and Asian residents.

You know, I am who I am.

Yeah.
